meta.feed_title: Al Jazeera – Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera

items.title: Ukraine targets Druzhba pipeline to sever Russian oil, influence in EU
items.summary: Hungary and Slovakia are still buying Russian oil. Seeing weakness in Brussels, Kyiv means to stop that trade.

items.title: 3-year-old rescued after falling into 18-metre-deep well in Syria
items.summary: 3-year-old rescued after falling into 18-metre-deep well in Syria

items.title: Indonesia puts four soldiers on trial over acid attack on activist
items.summary: The accused face up to 12 years in prison for the attack that burned one-fifth of activist Andrie Yunus's body.

items.title: ‘Particularly badly exposed’: How the Iran war is hitting the UK
items.summary: The likelihood of economic woes and unrest grows as the conflict shows no sign of ending.

items.title: Red card for players covering their mouths in World Cup matches
items.summary: New red card rule allows referees to send off players who cover their mouths or walk off the pitch in protest against a decision.

items.title: ‘Encouraging’: Global rainforest loss slows in 2025 after record year
items.summary: The researchers credit the slowdown to policies implemented by Brazil's President Lula da Silva to curb deforestation.

items.title: Is India’s Chabahar dream in Iran dead?
items.summary: The port has been a centrepiece of India's regional strategic ambitions. Now, those hopes are sinking.

items.title: Two Kashmir brothers: One killed by rebels, another by army 26 years later
items.summary: The killings encapsulate the tragedy unfolding in region for decades, as the family grapples with unanswered questions.

items.title: Life in limbo: How Iranians navigate a state of ‘no war, no peace’
items.summary: Tehran’s residents are living through a fragile truce and deep economic uncertainty.

items.title: Iran war: What’s happening on day 61 as UAE exits OPEC?
items.summary: Trump says Iran is in a 'state of collapse' as Gulf leaders meet in Saudi Arabia.

items.title: PSG vs Bayern Munich: Football players, fans react to Champions League semi
items.summary: The nine-goal thriller in Paris is hailed as one of the best football matches across all competitions.

items.title: Europe named ‘fastest-warming continent’ in latest climate change report
items.summary: From heatwaves to wildfires and shrinking ice cover, Europe is facing 'severe' impact from climate change, UN body says.

items.title: Can Russia serve as an economic lifeline for Iran amid the Hormuz blockade?
items.summary: Analysts say that Moscow could offer a 'lifeline' but  logistical issues, costs offer little incentive in the long-run.

items.title: White House hails ‘two kings’ as King Charles delivers pointed remarks
items.summary: King Charles III has hailed US-UK ties at a state dinner in the White House.

items.title: Afghan students recount harrowing university strike
items.summary: Afghan students have described the moment a missile hit their university. Officials blame Pakistan for Monday’s attack.

items.title: US Senate blocks bid to stop Trump using military against Cuba
items.summary: Senator ​Tim Kaine says if anyone did to the US 'what we are doing to Cuba', it would be considered 'an act of war'.

items.title: UN aid chief says situation in Somalia worsened by US war on Iran
items.summary: UN relief coordinator Tom Fletcher has slammed the war on Iran during a visit to Somalia.

items.title: US, Latin America countries criticise China’s retaliation over Panama Canal
items.summary: China has detained nearly 70 Panamanian-flagged ships after Supreme Court ruling on Panama Canal, US officials say.

items.title: Trump to feature on limited-edition US passports for 250th anniversary
items.summary: The passports are part of broader plans to celebrate the milestone anniversary of the US Declaration of Independence.

items.title: Lebanon’s PM slams Israel’s ‘war crimes’ as attack kills 3 rescue workers
items.summary: Lebanese President Joseph Aoun says Israel violating international law that protects civilians and humanitarian workers.

items.title: UAE quits OPEC as oil cartel takes blow during war on Iran
items.summary: The UAE’s decision to quit OPEC to prioritise its ‘national interests’ deals a blow to the oil group.

items.title: Mali’s military leader emerges after alleged coup attempt
items.summary: Mali’s military leader says the country is ‘under control’ after what’s been described as an attempted coup.

items.title: US appeals court rejects Trump’s immigration detention policy
items.summary: In a 3-0 ruling, court says Trump administration misread a decades-old immigration law to justify mandatory detention.

items.title: Iran war live: Trump threatens Iran to ‘get smart soon’ amid stalled talks
items.summary: US president says Iran has reached out and asked Washington to lift its naval blockade on Iranian ports.

items.title: Israeli soldier shows Gaza’s Beit Hanoon completely flattened
items.summary: A video filmed by an Israeli soldier shows widespread destruction in northern Gaza.
